title: Zhipeiweidu
description:
一个由你支配的维度，该维度内不会自然生成生物，仅有一层世界方块，它完全是个完美的私人家园
A dimension under your control, where no creatures naturally spawn, consisting only of a layer of world blocks—a perfect private sanctuary.
body:
The Control Dimension is a dimension exclusive to the player, where no entities naturally spawn.

This mod adds a bedrock-interior block that serves as the dimension's foundation. There is only a single layer, containing no other blocks or entities, providing the player with the ultimate private space.

- Space Block: Just a block.
- Otherworld Remote: Hold to teleport to the new world; hold again to return to the dimension you were originally in.
- New World: The new dimension.

Dimension ID: `zhipei_dimensions:your_space`![新维度和遥控器](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55a22245891226ed8406565fbba9d5d44cbae18c.png)
